# /final-review

## Purpose
Validate final review consistency, drift detection, and ADR linkage before opening a PR.

## When To Use
After review-cycle passes and the branch is nearly ready to publish.

## Required Contracts
- `final-review-consistency` - final-review evidence status and commit/range linkage are consistent
- `drift-detection` - Declared issue targets and actual changed paths must not drift
- `review-evidence-link` - Review evidence links to current commit/range
- `adr-index-consistency` - ADR body, JSON index, and decisions index are consistent

## Next Commands
- `/create-pr`

- `framework/scripts/manifest.yaml`
